task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Mara River crossing area near 1°29'S, 35°01'E.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view showing a river in a savanna landscape; coordinates in the status bar or search box match approximately 1°29'S, 35°01'E (or -1.48, 35.01).

task_completion.description: Agent used the ruler or measurement tool to measure the river width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Ruler' or 'Measure' dialog is open, and a measurement line is drawn across the river on the map.

task_completion.description: Agent created a placemark named 'Mara River Crossing Point'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog is visible with 'Mara River Crossing Point' typed in the Name field.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the measured width into the placemark description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Placemark dialog, the Description field contains a numeric value followed by 'm', 'meters', or similar (e.g., '45m'), matching the measurement tool's result.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the placemark as a KML file to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save File' or 'Save Place As' dialog is visible showing the filename 'mara_crossing.kml' and destination '/home/ga/Documents/'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved a screenshot of the view to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Image' dialog or command is visible saving a file named 'mara_crossing_view.png' to '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI-based mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) rather than a text editor or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application (3D globe or 2D map with toolbars) rather than a code editor or terminal window as the primary focus.

integrity.description: The width value was derived from actual tool usage, not hallucinated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement tool window is visible with a value that corresponds to the value later typed into the placemark description.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the KML file content.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of typing XML/KML tags (e.g., <Placemark>, <coordinates>) into a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Mara River near 1°29'S, 35°01'E (approx -1.4833, 35.0167). Valid river width at this location is between 25 and 75 meters. The landscape should appear as a river cutting through grassy plains.
